title: Delhi vs Mumbai
subTitle: Couples from Mumbai and Delhi face emotional dilemmas as their relationship with their partners and best friends are put to the test.

title: Dude
subTitle: DUDE's investigation reveals suspects' dark secrets and hidden truths, while tension rises as he nears solving the mystery, triggering events that uncover his past adventures.

title: Dude
subTitle: As Dude’s mistrust of Mrs Pal grows and Mr Pal pulls his case from being investigated, Dude becomes more determined to expose the falsehood and intends to assist Mr Kumar against Pawa ji’s wishes.

title: Dude
subTitle: As his investigation continues, DUDE finds that there is more to the case than he thought. Soon, he becomes embroiled in a number of problems and must balance his personal and professional life.

title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar
subTitle: During the celebration, Anamika and Vishal decide to dance together. As a result, their performance causes their relationship to grow deeper.

title: Kuch Love Jaisa
subTitle: Shashank and Roshni, two single parents, wish to have someone to rely on. However, they stop themselves from being together in order to avoid social pressure.

title: Kuch Love Jaisa
subTitle: S01 EP 02 Story of two single parents, Shashank and Roshni, who need someone to rely on, but don't want to accept the emotions of being together due to social pressure.

title: Kuch Love Jaisa
subTitle: Shashank and Roshni, two single parents, wish to have someone to rely on. However, they stop themselves from being together in order to avoid social pressure.

title: Kuch Love Jaisa
subTitle: S01 EP 04 Story of two single parents, Shashank and Roshni, who need someone to rely on, but don't want to accept the emotions of being together due to social pressure.

title: Office Ka Pyaar
subTitle: Things take an unexpected turn when Rachit finds out about Kashvi and her true feelings behind their kiss. Will his crush break his heart?

title: Office Ka Pyaar
subTitle: A former lover's return brings tension, theatrics and unforeseen twists. Consequently, this time we delve into comical and poignant instances where bygone days clash with the present.

title: Pehla Pehla
subTitle: A coming-of-age series about first experiences, from crushes to jobs and life decisions.

title: Roomies
subTitle: Four roommates navigate college life, balancing studies and personal growth.

title: The Great Indian Wedding
subTitle: An arranged marriage that's secretly for love, a social media addict, a grumpy uncle, and a hidden diary. This wedding has it all!

title: The Viral Jodi
subTitle: A couple unexpectedly goes viral on social media, catapulting them to sudden fame.

title: The Sarkari Karyalay
subTitle: A comedic look at the daily life in a government office, filled with bureaucratic inefficiencies and quirky characters.

title: Couple Goals
subTitle: Rishi and Maahi keep going back and forth while discussing adopting a dog. Later, at their housewarming party, they encounter a problem.

title: Backpackers
subTitle: Mrigakshi approves the opportunity to be the principal of the organisation's project. Parth, Urshi and BT assist her to commence an exploration beyond her comfort zone.

title: Backpackers
subTitle: Mrigakshi perceives that every experience is a novel tale to esteem. On a subsequent trek, Mrigakshi ascertains a new persona by triumphing over her apprehensions with the aid of accompanying individuals.

title: Backpackers
subTitle: After a good time, Mrigakshi realises she has missed out on many things and convinces Parth and BT to join her on another trek while Ushmi, who is on a soul search, also agrees to join the group.
